headline: Apple launches lower cost iPhone 17e and a new iPad Air powered by its M4 chip
summary: Apple opens week of product launches with refreshed low-cost iPhone and a faster iPad Air, as it begins what looks to be a broader multi-day hardware push.

headline: Assessing Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) Valuation After Mixed Share Price Performance And Diversification Hopes
summary: Why Skyworks Solutions is on investors’ radar today Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) is attracting fresh attention after a mixed run in its share price, with a gain over the past month but weaker returns over the past 3 months and year. That performance comes against a backdrop of annual revenue of US$4,053.8m and net income of US$394.3m, alongside reported annual revenue and net income growth and a value score of 4 that some investors may watch closely. headline: Skyworks and MediaTek Showcase Early 6G FR3 and PC1 RF Front-End Innovations at MWC 2026
summary: Live Demonstrations at MediaTek Hall 3, Stand 3D10BARCELONA, Spain, March 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Skyworks Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: SWKS) announced it will showcase an early 6G new FR3 frequency range RF front-end (RFFE) power amplifier at Mobile World Congress 2026 (MWC26), taking place in Barcelona from March 2–5, 2026.
